description: Set up the Python FastAPI backend project structure, database models, and core infrastructure. Remove the old Node.js backend/ directory contents and replace with a Python project that includes: project config (requirements.txt, pyproject.toml), SQLAlchemy models matching all 17 Prisma models, database setup with SQLite, JWT auth middleware, role-based access control, response helpers matching the existing format, and file upload handling.
steps: Delete all files in backend/ EXCEPT backend/uploads/.gitkeep and backend/prisma/dev.db (keep the existing SQLite database for reference). Remove backend/node_modules if present.

Create backend/requirements.txt with: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], sqlalchemy, aiosqlite, python-jose[cryptography], passlib[bcrypt], python-multipart, pydantic, pydantic-settings, openpyxl, fpdf2, pytest, pytest-asyncio, httpx
Create backend/app/__init__.py (empty)

Create backend/app/main.py - FastAPI app entry point with CORS, static file serving for uploads (authenticated), mount all route modules under /api, health check at /api/health, serve frontend static in production mode, error handling middleware. Must listen on PORT env var (default 5000).
Create backend/app/database.py - SQLAlchemy setup with async engine pointing to SQLite file (DATABASE_URL env or file:./dev.db), SessionLocal factory, Base declarative base, get_db dependency
Create backend/app/config.py - Pydantic Settings class reading PORT, DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, NODE_ENV from env/.env file
Create backend/app/models/__init__.py - import all models
Create backend/app/models/user.py - User model (id UUID, email unique, password, role default STUDENT, name, phone nullable, photo nullable, isActive default True, createdAt, updatedAt)
Create backend/app/models/student.py - Student model (id UUID, userId FK unique, batchId FK nullable, counsellorId FK nullable, enrollmentDate, mode default OFFLINE)
Create backend/app/models/trainer.py - Trainer model (id UUID, userId FK unique, specialization nullable)
Create backend/app/models/counsellor.py - Counsellor model (id UUID, userId FK unique)
Create backend/app/models/batch.py - Batch model (id UUID, name, startDate, endDate nullable, isActive default True)
Create backend/app/models/module.py - Module model (id UUID, name, description nullable, duration nullable int)
Create backend/app/models/batch_module.py - BatchModule model (id UUID, batchId FK, moduleId FK, status default PENDING, completionPercent default 0, unique constraint on batchId+moduleId)
Create backend/app/models/trainer_batch.py - TrainerBatch (id UUID, trainerId FK, batchId FK, unique trainerId+batchId)
Create backend/app/models/counsellor_student.py - CounsellorStudent (id UUID, counsellorId FK, studentId FK, unique counsellorId+studentId)

Create backend/app/models/lecture.py - Lecture (id UUID, batchId FK, moduleId FK, trainerId FK, date DateTime, startTime str, endTime str, duration int nullable, topics str nullable, sessionToken str nullable)
Create backend/app/models/attendance.py - Attendance (id UUID, studentId FK, lectureId FK, status default ABSENT, markedAt DateTime, method default MANUAL, unique studentId+lectureId)
Create backend/app/models/marks.py - Marks (id UUID, studentId FK, moduleId FK, type str, score float, maxScore float, remarks nullable)
Create backend/app/models/mock_interview.py - MockInterview (id UUID, studentId FK, trainerId FK, date DateTime, communication/technical/confidence/overallScore all Float nullable, feedback nullable)

Create backend/app/models/assignment.py - Assignment (id UUID, moduleId FK, batchId FK, trainerId FK, title, description nullable, dueDate nullable, filePath nullable) and Submission (id UUID, assignmentId FK, studentId FK, filePath nullable, submittedAt, grade nullable, feedback nullable)
Create backend/app/models/resource.py - Resource (id UUID, moduleId FK, trainerId FK, title, filePath nullable, uploadedAt DateTime)

Create backend/app/models/fee.py - Fee (id UUID, studentId FK, totalAmount float, paidAmount float default 0, pendingAmount float, dueDate nullable, status default PENDING) and FeePayment (id UUID, feeId FK, amount float, paidAt DateTime, method str)
Create backend/app/models/notification.py - Notification (id UUID, userId FK, title, message, type nullable, isRead default False, createdAt DateTime)
Create backend/app/models/announcement.py - Announcement (id UUID, createdById FK, title, message, targetRole nullable, batchId nullable, createdAt DateTime)
Create backend/app/dependencies.py - JWT authentication dependency (authenticate), role_guard dependency factory, get_current_user. JWT decode using python-jose, verify user is active in DB.

Create backend/app/utils/response.py - success_response(data, message, status_code), error_response(message, status_code), paginated_response(data, total, page, limit) that return JSONResponse objects matching exact format: {success: true/false, data, message, error, total, page, limit, totalPages}

Create backend/app/utils/upload.py - File upload utility using python-multipart. Save files to backend/uploads/ with UUID filenames. Validate file types (same allowed types as Node version: pdf, docx, xlsx, pptx, images, zip, rar, txt). Max 10MB.
Create backend/.env with DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./dev.db, JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key, PORT=5000
Install dependencies: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
acceptance_criteria: backend/app/main.py exists and can be imported without errors
All 17 SQLAlchemy models are defined and match the Prisma schema field-for-field
Running 'cd backend && python -c "from app.main import app; print(app.title)"' succeeds
Running 'cd backend && python -c "from app.models import *"' succeeds
The authenticate dependency correctly validates JWT tokens
The role_guard dependency correctly checks user roles
Response helpers produce the exact JSON format the frontend expects
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Institute-ERP/backend && python -c "from app.main import app; print('App created:', app.title)"

cd /projects/sandbox/Institute-ERP/backend && python -c "from app.models import User, Student, Trainer, Counsellor, Batch, Module, BatchModule, TrainerBatch, CounsellorStudent, Lecture, Attendance, Marks, MockInterview, Assignment, Submission, Resource, Fee, FeePayment, Notification, Announcement; print('All models imported successfully')"
